description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 3

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 1

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 14

Components: Mas, Mob

To use this technique, the target must be of a size category no larger than you, and must have missed with an armed melee attack against you since your last turn. You must also have both hands free. Initiate a grapple attempt against the target, which does not provoke an attack of opportunity. If successful, you throw the target 10 ft in any direction, other than directly behind you. The creature is also knocked @Condition[prone]{prone} upon landing (Reflex negates).

If it collides with a solid object, it takes 1d6 fall damage, as though they had fallen 10 feet.

Mastery: The second and fourth steps each increase the distance you can throw the target by 5 ft, which also increases the effective fall damage by 1d6 / 10 ft per step.

The second step also allows you to use this technique as a full-round action. If you do, you deal normal unarmed attack damage on a successful grapple attempt.

The fifth step allows you to use this technique against a target that did not attack or miss you recently, and requires you only have a single hand free.
